"Crawling is more natural to me. Did I scare you?" - Pieck Finger

༻–––––ᨎ–––––༒–––––ᨎ–––––༺

Pieck Finger, an Eldian Warrior of Marley and inheritor of the Cart Titan, who remained in her Titan form for two straight months due to its usefulness. Now returned to her hometown of Liberio, she is forced to walk with a crutch—yet there is still someone she needs to see..
